name: Do I need a **marketing lawyer** to handle AI visibility issues for my firm?
description: **No, but experts speed recognitions; DIY audit first.**[1]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a **marketing lawyer** to handle AI visibility issues for my firm?

acceptedAnswer.text: **No, but experts speed recognitions; DIY audit first.**[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Not legally required, but a specialist accelerates third-party recognitions and audits.** AI issues are business strategy, not litigation.[1] Experts navigate directories effectively.[2]

**Key factors:**
- No regulatory mandates
- PR/SEO expertise key
- Cost vs. ROI
- Local directory nuances

**Self-audit first, then hire for complex optimizations.** Avoid generalists.[3] **Specialists deliver faster results.**
